note: Canonical reusable birth-case registry. These are the recurring birth inputs that the compat/runtime fixture files encode in their own `input` blocks. Each case is recorded here once, by stable id, with the calendar-system-specific birth fields plus algorithm-independent identity metadata (birth-year ganzhi). Algorithms stay in MANIFEST.json: a case describes a person/birth instant, not a chart algorithm. The committed fixture files keep their own self-contained `input` blocks for standalone readability; `tests/fixture_case_registry.rs` checks that those duplicated blocks stay consistent with the case registered here. The lunar `1990_05_17_chen_female` case is the canonical lunar reading (lunar 1990-5-17); the `major_stars`/`minimal_natal` fixtures of the same id encode a solar reading (solar 1990-05-17) and are therefore not drift-checked against this lunar case.
